steps: Go to https://dash.cloudflare.com and log in or create a free account
Click your user icon in the top right, then select 'My Profile'
Click 'API Tokens' in the left sidebar
Select the 'Edit zone DNS' template, or click 'Create Custom Token'
Under Permissions, add: Zone > DNS > Edit (and optionally Zone > DNS > Read)
Under Zone Resources, select the specific zone(s) or 'All zones'
Copy the token — it is shown only once

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Token
credential_fields.description: Your Cloudflare API Token with DNS permissions

notes: Use the scoped API Token (not the Global API Key) — grant only 'Zone > DNS' permissions
You will also need your Zone ID, available in the Cloudflare dashboard Overview page for each domain
The token is sent as: Authorization: Bearer <token>
DNS management is available on all Cloudflare plans including free
Token is shown only once — store it securely immediately after creation

test_endpoint.description: Verify the API token is valid and active
